title: Sinners Production Designer Hannah Beachler Oscar Nomination
text: Hannah Beachler has been nominated for her second Oscar award for best production design of Sinners. Hannah Beachler of Centerville is nominated for production design of the critically acclaimed film Sinners—a Southern Gothic that's a period piece, a vampire thriller and a thoughtful exploration of cultural resilience, all rolled into one. The film made Oscar history with 16 total nominations, more than any other film in Academy Award history. In 2019, she became the first African American to win an Oscar for production design for her work on Black Panther. Regarding her work on Sinners, Beachler helped bring to life director Ryan Coogler's Southern Gothic vampire thriller. She discussed the meticulous research involved, explaining that she focused on historically accurate details reflecting the 1932 time period and Jim Crow segregation era depicted in the film.
